name: ServiceNow, Inc.

profile.description: ServiceNow is a leading enterprise workflow automation platform with $3.67B Q1 2026 subscription revenue (+22% YoY). Now Assist AI exceeded $600M ACV, tracking toward $1B for 2026. cRPO of $12.64B (+22.5%). CEO Bill McDermott. $105B market cap. Headquartered in Santa Clara, California.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Track Record (2/3): ServiceNow transformed from IT ticketing to enterprise workflow automation platform — one of the most successful software pivots of the decade [1]. AI Deployment (2/2): Now Assist AI exceeded $600M ACV tracking to $1B in 2026, with 'powerful agentic AI innovations' launched across the platform [1]. Market Share (2/2): Dominant enterprise workflow platform with 22% subscription growth. Product Pipeline (2/2): cRPO of $12.64B (+22.5%) provides exceptional multi-year visibility [1]. R&D Intensity (0/1): At industry average.

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (2/4): ServiceNow's purpose of 'making the world work better for everyone' is genuine and specific. Community Impact (1/2): Enterprise automation improves organizational efficiency. Employee Retention (1/2): Strong tech culture under McDermott. Insider Buying (1/2): McDermott's equity-heavy compensation aligns with shareholders.

infrastructure.label: DEVELOPING
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored. Subscription revenue of $3.67B grew 22% YoY [1]. Forward P/E of 20.3 is just above target. Profit margin of 12.6% below target. ROE of 16.1% above target. D/E of 20.7% well below target. Revenue growth of 22.1% well above target. Strong growth metrics partially offset by premium valuation [1].

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (6/9): ServiceNow's enterprise workflow platform has deep customer integration, proprietary data, and switching costs [1]. AI enhances rather than threatens the platform. However, AI-native workflow tools could emerge as competitors. AI Opportunity (1/1): Now Assist AI at $600M+ ACV growing rapidly toward $1B demonstrates meaningful AI revenue [1].

infinite_game.summary: ServiceNow under McDermott shows infinite game characteristics through consistent platform vision and customer-centric innovation, but the aggressive growth targets and competitive positioning are fundamentally finite-game.

just_cause.analysis: Just Cause (1/3): 'Making the world work better' is genuine but standard for enterprise software [1].

worthy_rivals.analysis: Worthy Rivals (1/1): McDermott acknowledges Microsoft, Salesforce as driving ServiceNow to innovate faster [1].

existential_flexibility.analysis: Existential Flexibility (1/2): IT ticketing to enterprise workflow platform evolution.

courage_to_lead.analysis: Courage to Lead (1/2): Heavy AI investment.

investment_thesis: ServiceNow delivers enterprise-class 22% subscription growth with $12.64B cRPO providing exceptional revenue visibility, while Now Assist AI at $600M+ ACV demonstrates successful AI monetization [1]. ROE of 16.1% and D/E of 20.7% reflect strong financial quality. The platform's deep customer integration and workflow automation create high switching costs.
thesis_continued: Forward P/E of 20.3 leaves limited margin of safety at $105B market cap [1]. Profit margin of 12.6% is below target for a software company. Enterprise IT spending could slow in a recession, impacting subscription growth. Microsoft and Salesforce competitive pressure in AI-powered workflow automation.
key_catalysts: Now Assist AI scaling toward $1B ACV target for 2026
Enterprise agentic AI adoption driving platform expansion
key_risks: Premium valuation at 20.3x forward earnings leaves limited margin of safety
Microsoft competitive threat in enterprise workflow with Copilot
Enterprise IT spending slowdown risk in uncertain economy
sources: Yahoo Finance — NOW Key Statistics, accessed June 2026
